message:
test(lifecycle): assert capabilities.connectors == diag.connectors (ibuuh.23)

Another cross-surface row of the ibuuh.23 validation matrix. cass ships
two places that enumerate the connector registry — cass capabilities
--json emits a string-array at .connectors, cass diag --json emits an
object-array with per-connector detection status at .connectors. Both
come from the same underlying registry; a drift (new connector added to
one surface but not the other) is a real contract bug — agents that
discover capabilities then plan ingestion via diag silently skip the
mismatched connector.

New test capabilities_and_diag_connectors_enumerate_the_same_set parses
both surfaces against an isolated HOME and sort-compares the connector
name sets. 58/58 pass locally, 2 consecutive stable re-runs.

Follow-up slice on coding_agent_session_search-ibuuh.23; bead stays open
for the scheduler-backed rows still blocked on upstream ibuuh.30/.32.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
